data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Approval deadlines and escalation' but failed to provide concrete evidence of how these elements are implemented within the system. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but does not detail any specific API endpoints or mechanisms that enforce approval deadlines or escalation procedures. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms enforcing approval deadlines and escalation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
